w:r.w:t: 6 System Roles | 37 Notification Events | 16 Automation Rules

TBT Admin is a centralized administration platform and mobile application ecosystem for Tamil Business Tribe — a business growth community serving entrepreneurs across India with focus on Tamil Nadu. The platform combines Learning Management (LMS), Task-based Accountability, Community Engagement, Live Sessions, Gamification, and Business Growth Tracking into a single integrated ecosystem.
Too opinionated, harder to customize to TBT brand
Simple client state + powerful server state
NextAuth too basic, Auth0 expensive at scale
RN bridge issues, native = 2x development cost
Firebase phone auth costs at scale, Clerk bad for mobile
RLS, Realtime, Edge Functions, Storage all-in-one
Firestore no SQL, PlanetScale no realtime/storage
Next.js API Routes + Supabase Edge Functions
Express = separate deployment, CORS issues, more infra cost
Extra config, separate billing, no RLS integration
Mux expensive, CF Stream limited, YouTube no DRM
Firebase Cloud Messaging + Supabase Edge Functions
OneSignal limits at scale, Pushy less reliable
Stripe settlement delays in India, PayU/Cashfree smaller ecosystem
Indian BSP, official Meta partner, ₹2500/mo, good API
AiSensy fewer features, Interakt unstable API, Twilio expensive
Zoom SDK expensive, Jitsi poor mobile, 100ms Indian support weak
Zero-config Next.js, free tier, edge network
Railway limited free tier, AWS complex for solo dev
Community, 1 free course, limited podcasts, no tasks
No account manager, no live sessions, no rewards, no certificates
All free courses, all podcasts, daily tasks, basic analytics
No live sessions, no 1-on-1, limited community
All courses, live webinars, account manager, full analytics, badges, challenges
Everything + 1-on-1 mentoring, priority support, VIP events, full rewards catalog, exclusive content
Custom programs, dedicated team, white-label, API access, bulk enrollment
Age: 20-35 | Starting first business | Limited capital (₹0-50K) | Motivated but confused
Learn business fundamentals, start earning online, validate business ideas, learn digital marketing
Information overload, no clear roadmap, lack of accountability, fear of failure, no mentor
Launch first business, generate first revenue within 90 days
Free → Starter plan, high engagement with tasks, needs constant motivation, likely to churn without accountability
Already running business | Revenue: ₹50K-10L/month | Textile, Salon, Restaurant, Gym, Coaching
Increase leads, increase sales, build online presence, reduce agency dependency, learn digital marketing
Wasting money on agencies, no marketing strategy, inconsistent execution, overwhelmed by technology
Higher revenue, higher lead generation, better digital presence within 90 days
Premium/VIP plan, needs practical implementation tasks, values account manager, high retention if results shown
Already earning well | Wants scaling | Has team but poor systems
Team building, process optimization, automation, brand building, thought leadership
Growth plateau, poor systems, lack of accountability, cant find right talent
Scalable growth, better systems, automated marketing
VIP/Enterprise plan, values networking and community, needs advanced content, high LTV
Independent professional | Variable income | Skill-rich, marketing-poor
Personal branding, client acquisition, lead generation, pricing strategy
Feast-famine income cycle, no marketing system, underpricing, no portfolio
Consistent clients, premium pricing, personal brand established
Starter/Premium plan, high course completion, active in community, values portfolio building
Knowledge professional | Wants to scale impact | Has expertise but no platform
Build audience, launch programs, create digital assets, monetize knowledge
Platform overwhelm, audience building, pricing confusion, tech barriers
Launched digital program, consistent audience growth, course sales
Premium/VIP plan, high content engagement, potential mentor role, values certification
Full CRUD everything, settings, roles, billing, system config
Day-to-day operations, content management, member management (no delete users, no settings)
Manage assigned members (20-50 each), review tasks, track progress, follow-up, weekly reports
Create/manage courses & podcasts, conduct live sessions, review tasks, answer community questions
Moderate community posts, manage support tickets, handle reports, maintain community standards
Consume content, complete tasks, engage community, attend sessions, track business growth
Layer 1 — Presentation: Next.js Admin (Vercel) + Flutter Mobile App
Layer 2 — API Gateway: Next.js API Routes (admin) + Supabase REST API (mobile)
Layer 3 — Business Logic: Supabase Edge Functions (notifications, webhooks, automations)
Layer 4 — Data: Supabase PostgreSQL + Supabase Storage + BunnyCDN
Layer 5 — External Services: Firebase FCM, Razorpay, Wati, LiveKit, Sentry, PostHog
Admin Browser → Next.js (Vercel) → Clerk Auth Middleware → Next.js API Route → Supabase Client (service role) → PostgreSQL (RLS bypassed for admin)
Flutter App → Supabase REST API → Supabase Auth (JWT) → PostgreSQL (RLS enforced — member sees only own data)
pg_cron (every minute) → Supabase Edge Function → Check habits/reminders due → Fetch FCM tokens → Send via FCM API → Phone receives push
Mobile App → Razorpay Checkout → Payment Success → Razorpay Webhook → Supabase Edge Function → Update subscription table → Unlock features
Automation Rule triggered → Supabase Edge Function → Wati API → WhatsApp message sent → Delivery status webhook → Update whatsapp_messages table
Primary Keys: id UUID DEFAULT gen_random_uuid()
Timestamps: created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
Audit: created_by UUID REFERENCES admins(id), updated_by UUID
Arrays: TEXT[] for tags, channels, challenges
JSON: JSONB for flexible/nested data (permissions, criteria, metadata)
Indexes: All foreign keys, status columns, created_at, and commonly filtered columns
Sales, CRM, Technology, Marketing, Operations, Finance, HR
Free text: Senior Account Manager, CRM Executive, etc.
FK → admins(id) ON DELETE SET NULL
Categorization: Sales, CRM, Senior, Tamil Nadu
Product, Service, Both, Manufacturing, Retail, etc.
Array: seo, paid_ads, social_media, email, referral, offline
Array of course IDs required before this one
FK → courses(id) NOT NULL ON DELETE CASCADE
FK → modules(id) NOT NULL ON DELETE CASCADE
BunnyCDN video URL / Supabase Storage URL
Unlock after previous lesson quiz passed
Array of {id, text, is_correct} for MCQ/multi_select
One enrollment per course per member
One progress record per lesson per member
One rating per course per member
90 Days Challenge, 21 Days Challenge, TBT Program, Textilepreneur, etc.
FK → programs(id) NOT NULL ON DELETE CASCADE
Onboarding, BMC & Metrics, Reels, Canva, Website, Ecom Ads, etc.
No duplicate step numbers per program
e.g., Fill Customer Segment in BMC
e.g., First Success, Business Foundation Complete
One task per day per program
One submission per task per enrollment
Specific batch_ids, program_ids, or plan names
One like per post per member
FK → badges(id) — badge earned on milestone
NOT NULL — task_completed, quiz_passed, streak_bonus, milestone, badge, redemption
task, quiz, lesson, podcast, badge, milestone, reward
5.10 Table Group 9: Support, Notifications, Automation, Audit

banners (id UUID PK, title TEXT, image_url TEXT, link_url TEXT, placement TEXT CHECK(home,course,webinar,event,campaign), target_audience JSONB, target_plan TEXT, priority INTEGER DEFAULT 0, starts_at TIMESTAMPTZ, expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, views_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, clicks_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, created_by UUID FK→admins, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ)

support_tickets (id UUID PK, member_id UUID FK→members, category TEXT, subject TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, priority TEXT CHECK(low,medium,high,critical) DEFAULT medium, status TEXT CHECK(open,in_progress,waiting_on_member,resolved,closed) DEFAULT open, assigned_to UUID FK→admins, escalated_to UUID FK→admins, resolution_notes TEXT, satisfaction_score INTEGER CHECK(1-5), first_response_at TIMESTAMPTZ, resolved_at TIMESTAMPTZ, closed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ)

support_messages (id UUID PK, ticket_id UUID FK→support_tickets ON DELETE CASCADE, sender_id UUID, sender_type TEXT CHECK(member,admin), message TEXT NOT NULL, attachments TEXT[], created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())

notifications (id UUID PK, member_id UUID FK→members, title TEXT NOT NULL, body TEXT NOT NULL, type TEXT, data JSONB, channel TEXT CHECK(push,in_app,whatsapp,email), is_read BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, read_at TIMESTAMPTZ, sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())

notification_templates (id UUID PK, event_type TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, title_template TEXT NOT NULL, body_template TEXT NOT NULL, channels TEXT[] DEFAULT {push,in_app}, variables TEXT[], is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ)

automation_rules (id UUID PK, name TEXT NOT NULL, trigger_event TEXT NOT NULL, trigger_conditions JSONB, delay_minutes INTEGER DEFAULT 0, actions JSONB NOT NULL, channels TEXT[], is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, execution_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, last_executed_at TIMESTAMPTZ, created_by UUID FK→admins, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ)

automation_logs (id UUID PK, rule_id UUID FK→automation_rules, member_id UUID FK→members, action_taken TEXT, channel TEXT, status TEXT CHECK(sent,failed,skipped), error_message TEXT, executed_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())

whatsapp_messages (id UUID PK, member_id UUID FK→members, template_name TEXT, message_body TEXT, wati_message_id TEXT, status TEXT CHECK(queued,sent,delivered,read,failed), sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ, delivered_at TIMESTAMPTZ, read_at TIMESTAMPTZ, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())

audit_logs (id UUID PK, admin_id UUID FK→admins, action TEXT NOT NULL CHECK(create,update,delete,login,logout,export,import), table_name TEXT, record_id UUID, old_data JSONB, new_data JSONB, ip_address TEXT, user_agent TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())
activity_logs (id UUID PK, user_id UUID NOT NULL, user_type TEXT CHECK(admin,member), action TEXT NOT NULL, metadata JSONB, ip_address TEXT, device_info TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())

member_sessions (id UUID PK, member_id UUID FK→members, started_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), ended_at TIMESTAMPTZ, duration_minutes INTEGER, screens_visited TEXT[], created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())

batches (id UUID PK, name TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, program_id UUID FK→programs, starts_at DATE, ends_at DATE, max_members INTEGER, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, created_by UUID FK→admins, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())

kyc_documents (id UUID PK, member_id UUID FK→members NOT NULL, document_type TEXT CHECK(aadhaar,pan,gst_certificate,business_registration,other), document_url TEXT NOT NULL, status TEXT CHECK(uploaded,under_review,verified,rejected) DEFAULT uploaded, verified_by UUID FK→admins, verified_at TIMESTAMPTZ, rejection_reason TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())

before_after_assessments (id UUID PK, member_id UUID FK→members NOT NULL, program_enrollment_id UUID FK→program_enrollments, assessment_type TEXT CHECK(before,after), data JSONB NOT NULL — {revenue,leads,team_size,marketing_budget,confidence_score,growth_score}, video_url TEXT, notes TEXT, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())
checklists (id UUID PK, program_id UUID FK→programs NOT NULL, category TEXT, item_text TEXT NOT NULL, sort_order INTEGER DEFAULT 0, is_mandatory BOOLEAN DEFAULT false, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ)
checklist_completions (id UUID PK, member_id UUID FK→members NOT NULL, checklist_id UUID FK→checklists NOT NULL, completed_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), UNIQUE(member_id,checklist_id))

resources (id UUID PK, title TEXT NOT NULL, description TEXT, resource_type TEXT CHECK(pdf,ebook,template,sop,case_study,video,checklist), file_url TEXT NOT NULL, thumbnail_url TEXT, access_type TEXT DEFAULT free, visibility JSONB — {type:all|batch|program|member, ids:[]}, download_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, created_by UUID FK→admins, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())

faqs (id UUID PK, category TEXT, question TEXT NOT NULL, answer TEXT NOT NULL, video_url TEXT, thumbnail_url TEXT, sort_order INTEGER DEFAULT 0, is_published BOOLEAN DEFAULT true, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())

settings (id UUID PK, key TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, value JSONB NOT NULL, category TEXT CHECK(general,branding,legal,notifications,integrations,gamification,automation), description TEXT, updated_by UUID FK→admins, updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now())
This is the flagship program of TBT. Every member enrolled in this program receives one task per day for 90 days, structured across 10 steps that progressively build business skills.
Attend onboarding call OR watch replay
Total base points across 90 days: ~9,050 points
49 tables created, Clerk integrated, Next.js admin deployed on Vercel, Supabase configured
Dashboard with 12 widgets, Admin creation/edit/list, Member creation with all fields, 360° profile view
Course CRUD, Module CRUD with drag-drop reorder, Lesson CRUD with video upload to BunnyCDN
Quiz engine (4 question types), lesson locking system, progress tracking, course enrollment
90-day program seeded with all 90 tasks, step management with reordering, submission + review workflow
Podcast CRUD with audio upload, banner management with scheduling, resource library with visibility controls
Community feed with posts/comments/likes/polls, LiveKit webinar integration, event management with QR attendance
Points ledger, streak tracking, badge system, milestone system, leaderboard, reward catalog + redemption
FCM push via Edge Functions, Wati WhatsApp integration, 16 automation rules configured, notification templates
Login, home, courses, lessons, tasks, podcasts, community, webinars, events, profile, leaderboard, notifications
Subscription management, payment webhook handling, invoice generation, support ticket system
End-to-end testing, performance optimization, production deployment, monitoring setup, documentation
Scope creep — new features during development
Strict PRD adherence, formal change request process, version-controlled PRD
Start with YouTube unlisted for MVP, migrate to BunnyCDN once revenue covers cost
Pre-approve templates with Meta, keep 5+ backup templates, use Wati template library
Monitor usage weekly, upgrade to Pro ($25/mo) at 200+ members — budget for this from day 1
Use Zoom links for MVP webinars, migrate to LiveKit in Phase 2 after core platform stable
Pagination everywhere, image caching, lazy loading, skeleton screens, offline indicators
FCM push reliability on Android OEMs
Already solved with server-side FCM via Edge Functions — bypasses all battery optimization
Use established patterns, shadcn/ui components, Supabase client libraries, follow this PRD exactly
Razorpay well-documented, use official Flutter SDK, test webhook thoroughly in sandbox
Supabase auto-backups, soft deletes everywhere, audit logs for all changes
Clean code, documented architecture, modular design, this PRD as documentation
Tamil Business Tribe | Complete Product Requirements Document
49 Database Tables | 85+ API Endpoints | 12 Modules | 90-Day Task Program
This document is the single source of truth for all development.
